The floor tiles and bathroom tiles are misaligned and the grouting is not done correctly leading to cuts and bruises. This is already discussed multiple times with the FM and project teams and on July 12th it was agreed to replace the faulty tiles redo the grouting. However, post completing one bathroom, the work had to be stopped owing to medical emergency with us (all of us tested positive for dengue). Subsequently, it was agreed with FM and project teams to start this work from Oct 22 given my family members will travel out and the house will be vacant. However, I haven’t heard back from the teams with respect to how would they plan do undertake this work and take precautions of my furniture and fixtures along with the wall and ceiling paint. Can you please on a priority look into this and outline a plan of action which can be discussed and finalised before the start of work. I had already identified these snags before possessio of the house and it was committed that the bathroom snags will be rectified for which I had kept my house open and accessible to the teams for more than a week post possession. However nothing happened! Hence, now I am asking for a detailed plan along with the timelines of how many days will it take to rectify these issues and what are the daily milestones that you are targeting to achieve. Awaiting your revert at the earliest.
